stemHtml:
What does the message “EGNOS IS NOT AVAILABLE FOR LPV” of the following NOTAM indicate?

Q) LSAS/QGAAU/I/NBO/A/000/999/4729N00933E005
A) LSZR B) 1401071300 C) 1401071458
E) EGNOS IS NOT AVAILABLE FOR LPV

options.a: SBAS is unavailable for RNAV approaches to LNAV minima.
options.b: ABAS is unavailable for approaches to LPV minima.
options.c: SBAS is unavailable for approaches to LPV minima.
options.d: ABAS is unavailable for all approaches.
